personal_info.name: Isuru (IG) Chathuranga
personal_info.title: AI/ML Engineer
personal_info.summary: Third-year IT & Management student at University of Colombo specializing in Applied Statistics & Data Science. Building production AI systems with PyTorch, LangChain, and MLOps expertise. Open source contributor to LangChain, PyTorch, Hugging Face, and MLflow.

projects.name: PersonaPlex: Full-Duplex Voice AI Agent
projects.description: A production-ready voice AI agent that answers real phone calls with sub-second latency. Features robust speech-to-text with end-of-speech detection and 100% customizable personas.

projects.name: Real-Time AI Research Agent
projects.description: Agentic system with autonomous web search, custom RAG, and automatic source citations. Hosted on Hugging Face Spaces with robust error handling and lazy initialization.

projects.name: Cost-Aware Fraud Detection System
projects.description: Production ML system optimized for business metrics (cost of false positives vs. false negatives). Features MLflow tracking, automated evaluation, and 92% test coverage.
achievements: End-to-end ML pipeline from features to production
Optimization for business metrics and costs

projects.name: Sri Lankan Market Intelligence Agent
projects.description: Multi-agent LangChain system with custom RAG for real-time market analysis. Production-deployed on GCP with monitoring and automated failover.
achievements: Production-ready LangChain agent implementation on GCP
Intelligent query handling with custom RAG

projects.name: ML Monitoring & Drift Detection System
projects.description: End-to-end ML monitoring pipeline with automated data drift detection alerts and real-time visualization dashboards.
achievements: Automated model drift detection and alerts

projects.name: Telco Churn Prediction Pipeline
projects.description: End-to-end ML system from feature engineering to production deployment — validated predictions driving business decisions.

projects.name: Multi-Modal Crypto Intelligence System
projects.description: Real-time sentiment orchestration and trading signal generation with sub-2s latency. AIOps integration for anomaly detection.
achievements: Real-time trading signal generation with sub-2s latency

projects.name: MediAgent SL: Multilingual Agentic Healthcare Navigator
projects.description: A 7-agent hierarchical system on LangGraph 1.0 with MCP for FHIR R4 clinical data. Intended to triage OPD patients and produce trilingual medical intake.
achievements: Multi-Agent system with trilingual support (Sinhala, Tamil, English)
Scalable triage engine handling dengue outbreak demand spikes
Graceful fallback states and pessimistic routing for emergencies
Dual output: patient explanation & clinical JSON (ICD-10/LOINC)

faqs.question: What kind of roles are you looking for?
faqs.answer: I'm seeking remote AI/ML engineering roles focusing on LLM engineering, multi-agent systems, MLOps/AIOps infrastructure, and production ML pipelines. Open to full-time opportunities, freelance projects, and technical collaborations.

faqs.question: What's your experience with production ML systems?
faqs.answer: I've deployed multiple production ML systems on GCP, AWS, and Azure. My projects include real-time market intelligence agents, crypto trading signal generators, ML monitoring systems with drift detection, and fraud detection pipelines.

faqs.question: Can you work remotely?
faqs.answer: Yes! I'm based in Colombo, Sri Lanka and fully remote-ready with experience in asynchronous collaboration. I'm comfortable working across time zones and have flexible availability.

faqs.question: What's your expertise in LangChain?
faqs.answer: I'm proficient with LangChain, specializing in multi-agent systems and RAG architectures. I've built production systems using LangChain for orchestrating complex AI workflows. I'm also an active open source contributor to the LangChain project.

faqs.question: Do you have MLOps experience?
faqs.answer: Yes, hands-on MLOps experience including FastAPI for ML APIs, Docker containerization, Kubernetes orchestration, MLflow for experiment tracking, Apache Airflow for workflow orchestration, and building automated pipelines with drift detection and monitoring.

faqs.question: Are you currently a student?
faqs.answer: Yes, I'm a 3rd-year student at University of Colombo pursuing dual degrees in IT & Management (with Applied Statistics & Data Science specialization) and BIT from UCSC. However, I've been building production ML systems and contributing to open source alongside my studies.

faqs.question: What makes you different from other AI/ML candidates?
faqs.answer: I focus on production-first engineering rather than just model training. Most AI engineers can train models, but I deploy them at scale, monitor performance, and fix them when they break. I combine statistical rigor from my academic background with practical MLOps expertise.

faqs.question: How can I contact you?
faqs.answer: You can reach me at isuruigic@gmail.com, through LinkedIn at linkedin.com/in/isuruig, via X/Twitter at x.com/Isuru_ig, or check out all my links at linktr.ee/isuruig. I typically respond within 24 hours.

availability.start_date: Immediately available for discussions, flexible start date
availability.work_hours: Flexible, can overlap with US/EU time zones
